Feng Chao ť¶ģśúĚ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Feng Chao (ť¶ģśúĚ). Asked by Sun Jun to build walls around Guangling, an expensive project that was never finished. Feng Chao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
